item.title: Lenovo ThinkStation PGX Review The NVIDIA GB10 128GB AI Workstation Goes Corporate

probe.title: Lenovo ThinkStation PGX Review The NVIDIA GB10 128GB AI Workstation Goes Corporate
probe.description: We test the Lenovo ThinkStation PGX, a NVIDIA GB10-based 128GB small AI workstation with a fast Arm CPU, Blackwell GPU, and 200G networking
